urdu transliteration text:
BAANU YE AABID (AS) KO BATLA RAHI HAI
Banu is telling Abid
Meri SAKINA (SA) Ko Neend Aa Rahi Hai
MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HAI

KEHDO HAWAAON SE AAHISTA AAYEIN
Tell the winds to blow softly
KEHDO PARINDON SE GHUL NA MACHAAYEIN
english translation text: Tell the birds to lower their cries

urdu transliteration text: KEHDO ANDHERON SE WAAPAS NA JAYEIN
english translation text: Tell the darkness not to revert

urdu transliteration text:
JAAGI HUWI CHAIN KUCH PAA RAHI HAI
The waking girl has found some peace
MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HAI
SHAAYAD RASAN KI AZIYAT HUWI KAM
english translation text: May be the tightness of the ropes has eased

urdu transliteration text: MADHAM KARO BIBIYON SHORE MAATAM
english translation text: O ladies reduce the tone of the matam

urdu transliteration text: SAJJAD(AS) ZANJEER BOLE NA IS DAM
english translation text: O Sajjad the chains have said

urdu transliteration text: SHAAYAD GHAMO KI GHARI JAA RAHI HAI
english translation text: May be the time of sorrows has subsided

urdu transliteration text: MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HA
YE SHAAME GHARIBAAN KI JAAGI HUWI HAI
english translation text: She has been awake since Shame  Gharibaan

urdu transliteration text: TAMAACHON KE DAR SE NAHI SO SAKI HAI
english translation text: She has not slept for fear of slaps

urdu transliteration text: ZARA PHIR GALE SE RASAN JO KHULI HAI
english translation text: The slight loosening of the rope around her neck

urdu transliteration text: SUKUN SE JO AB SAANS LE PA RAHI HAI
english translation text: Has caused her to breathe easier

urdu transliteration text: MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HAI
MEIN KHUSH HUN KE SOYEGI MERI DULAARI
english translation text: I am happy that my sweet girl will sleep now

urdu transliteration text: MEIN QURBAAN IS KE MEIN AB IS KE WAARI
english translation text: May I be sacrificed for her

urdu transliteration text: BOHAT SEH CHUKI DUKH YE GHAZI (AS) KI PYAARI
english translation text: The favourite of Abbas(Ghazi) has endured so much

urdu transliteration text:
MAGAR NABZ KUCH AUR BATLA RAHI HAI
But her weak pulse says something else
MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HAI

BANO YE AABID (AS) KO BATLA RAHI HAI
Bano is telling Abid
MERI SAKINA (SA) KO NEEND AA RAHI HAI
